queries.question: List orthodontists and periodontists with a Master of Science in Dentistry degree.
queries.sql:
SELECT Dentists.FullName
FROM Dentists JOIN Education ON Dentists.EducationID = Education.ID
WHERE (Dentists.DentalSpecialty = "Orthodontist" OR Dentists.DentalSpecialty = "Periodontist") AND Education.Degree = "Master of Science in Dentistry"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?dentists a :Dentists .
  ?education a :Education .
  ?dentists p:hasEducation ?education .
  ?dentists p:name ?fullname .
  ?dentists p:DentalSpecialty ?dentalspecialty_w .
  ?dentists p:DentalSpecialty ?dentalspecialty_w2 .
  ?education p:Degree ?degree_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?dentalspecialty_w) = "Orthodontist" || STR(?dentalspecialty_w2) = "Periodontist")) && STR(?degree_w) = "Master of Science in Dentistry"))
}
